metadata.name: Create Signature Packets for a Closing

description: For a large real estate closing, a paralegal needs to prepare signature packets for each signatory with all the documents they need to sign.

nodes.task_description: Identify all documents that require a signature from each specific party.

expected_outcome.value: Agent creates a list of required signatures for each person.

nodes.task_description: For each signatory, compile their required documents into a single PDF.

expected_outcome.value: Agent creates a separate PDF packet for each person.

nodes.task_description: Add 'Sign Here' flags to all the signature lines in each packet to make signing easier.

expected_outcome.value: The signature packets are prepared and user-friendly.
